summary: Comprehensive testing of Kavach DPDPA 2023 compliance platform completed. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI working with minor logout UX issue. All core features tested successfully including authentication, dashboard, data management, compliance tracking, and security monitoring.

ui_bugs.issue: Logout functionality not easily discoverable - no clear logout button in user profile dropdown

passed_tests: Login with valid credentials (admin@bharatiyabank.example.com / Kavach@2024)
Login error handling with wrong password shows 'Invalid credentials'
GET /api/auth/me returns user data after login
Dashboard loads with compliance score gauge showing 61/100
Risk distribution chart displays Critical: 8, High: 1 assets
Compliance score trend chart with 6-month progression
Consent status chart showing 2.8M total, 1.9M active consents
Recent scan jobs table with 5 completed scans
SLA breaches table showing Lakshmi Narasimhan case
Data Sources page shows 5 sources all with CONNECTED status
Assets page navigation and risk tier filtering
Asset detail page with column classifications table
Consent Manager dashboard with consent stats display
Rights Hub page with rights requests and SLA indicators
Breach Sentinel page with 3 breach events and severity badges
72-hour countdown clock for DPBI notification deadline
Breach anomalies tab showing 4 anomalies
Risk Flags page with severity filtering capability
Vendor Trust page showing 5 vendors with risk scores
Compliance Score page with overall 61/100 and module scores
Sidebar navigation working for all pages
All 19 backend API endpoints returning correct status codes and data
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UX improvement needed: Add clear logout button or improve user profile dropdown to make logout functionality more discoverable. All core functionality is working perfectly.

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (1 minor UX issue with logout discovery)
